summary: Complete frontend testing of FinanceSaathi app. All 11 features tested and working correctly. UI is well-designed with proper color coding, responsive mobile layout, and graceful error handling when backend is unavailable.

issues: Date inputs use browser default date picker (native <input type='date'>) instead of custom shadcn Calendar component - minor UX concern, works functionally

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Error handling gracefully shows 'Unavailable', 'Not Found', or 'Could not load' when backend API fails
Indian currency formatting (₹) correctly implemented with font-mono class
Color coding correct: emerald for income/receivables, rose for expense/payables
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features verified. Backend is external at localhost:3001 and not running - expected behavior confirmed with graceful error states.
passed_tests: Dashboard/Home loads with greeting, 4 stat cards showing 'Unavailable', receivables/payables sections, recent activity, 4 quick record shortcuts
Sidebar has all 8 navigation sections: Dashboard, Record Transaction, Pending Entries, Customers & Suppliers, Who Owes You, Who You Owe, Trial Balance, Profit & Loss
Record Transaction page shows all 8 transaction type cards (Cash Sale, Credit Sale, Received Payment, Cash Purchase, Supplier Bill, Expense Payment, Paid a Bill, Owner Withdrawal)
Sale Form: Cash/Credit toggle works, amount input functional, date picker present, payment mode toggle (Cash/Bank), Save Draft and Post Entry buttons visible
Payment Form: Expense/Vendor/Withdrawal tabs all functional, 5 expense categories (Salary/Rent/Freight/Utility/Other), supplier search for vendor payments
Parties page: Filter tabs (All/Customers/Suppliers) working, search input functional, Add Party button visible
Receivables page: Shows 'Not Found' error state with total receivable summary
Payables page: Shows 'Not Found' error state with total payable summary
Trial Balance page: Date filters (From/To) present, Load button works
Profit & Loss page: Date filters present, This Financial Year button works, Load button works
Mobile responsive: Bottom navigation bar visible with 5 tabs (Home, Pending, Record, People, Reports), all tabs navigate correctly

design_review.colors: Correctly uses emerald (rgb(5, 150, 105)) for income/positive, rose (rgb(225, 29, 72)) for expense/negative
design_review.typography: font-mono class used for monetary values
design_review.sidebar: Dark background (rgb(15, 23, 42) - slate-900) with adequate text contrast
design_review.responsive: Desktop sidebar hidden on mobile, bottom nav appears for mobile viewport
